channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: SCOTUS upholds abortion pill telehealth access. And, Trump returns from China visit
item.description: The Supreme Court kept access to the abortion pill mifepristone available via telehealth. And, Trump says he made multiple trade deals during his state visit to China.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court kept access to the abortion pill mifepristone available via telehealth. And, Trump says he made multiple trade deals during his state visit to China.

(Image credit: Natalie Behring)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Key takeaways from Trump's China trip
item.description: President Trump returns to the U.S. after wrapping up his whirlwind trip to China.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump returns to the U.S. after wrapping up his whirlwind trip to China.

(Image credit: Evan Vucci)
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: Death toll in attack on Kyiv apartment building now stands at 24
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Friday that a Russian missile attack on a Kyiv apartment building the previous day killed 24 people, including three children.
item.content:encoded:
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Friday that a Russian missile attack on a Kyiv apartment building the previous day killed 24 people, including three children.

(Image credit: Evgeniy Maloletka)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Which Trump cabinet member has a new reality show? The quiz knows
item.description: This week, in Warshington, D.C., the Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as the next chair of the Federal Reserve and we wrote a quiz question about his name. Enjoy that, and the other nine, too.
item.content:encoded: This week, in Warshington, D.C., the Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh as the next chair of the Federal Reserve and we wrote a quiz question about his name. Enjoy that, and the other nine, too.
item.dc:creator: Holly J. Morris

item.title: After redistricting, what does representation mean to Tennessee voters?
item.description: What does representation look like for Tennessee voters who were split into three new congressional districts last week? NPR traveled from Memphis into the Nashville suburbs to ask.
item.content:encoded:
What does representation look like for Tennessee voters who were split into three new congressional districts last week? NPR traveled from Memphis into the Nashville suburbs to ask.

(Image credit: Madison Thorn/Bloomberg via Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler

item.title: Gen Z homeowners? Yes, more in their 20s are managing to buy despite the odds
item.description: Gen Z homeowners now outpace millennials at the same age. They're more likely to be single and less likely to use help from parents.
item.content:encoded:
Gen Z homeowners now outpace millennials at the same age. They're more likely to be single and less likely to use help from parents.

(Image credit: Caleb Alvarado for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Ludden

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump returns to U.S. after trip to China, Supreme Court decides to maintain abortion pill access, U.K. prime minister faces challenges from his own party.
item.content:encoded: Trump returns to U.S. after trip to China, Supreme Court decides to maintain abortion pill access, U.K. prime minister faces challenges from his own party.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Son reflects with his mother about growing up with autism
item.description: Jhovana Figueroa was diagnosed with autism when he was a toddler. For StoryCorps, Figueroa and his mom talk about his childhood and their hopes for the future.
item.content:encoded: Jhovana Figueroa was diagnosed with autism when he was a toddler. For StoryCorps, Figueroa and his mom talk about his childhood and their hopes for the future.
item.dc:creator: Esther Honig

item.title: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Raul Castro's grandson in Havana, US and Cuban officials say
item.description: CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Cuban officials including Raúl Castro's grandson during a high-level visit to the island Thursday, Cuban and U.S. officials said.
item.content:encoded:
CIA Director John Ratcliffe met with Cuban officials including Raúl Castro's grandson during a high-level visit to the island Thursday, Cuban and U.S. officials said.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Pope decries rise of AI-directed warfare, saying it leads to a spiral of annihilation
item.description: Pope Leo XIV denounced how investments in artificial intelligence and high-tech weaponry were leading the world into a "spiral of annihilation," as he called for peace in the Middle East and Ukraine.
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV denounced how investments in artificial intelligence and high-tech weaponry were leading the world into a "spiral of annihilation," as he called for peace in the Middle East and Ukraine.

(Image credit: Gregorio Borgia)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
